project: PRJ03266 - Well Services Group (Exlog) - Exlog (WSG) - WRF-2 - GR_CCL
comment: Tools unable to pass TRSSV, way forward TBC.

project: PRJ03262 - SLB - SLB Denmark - DFA16 (MFA-16)_DFA18 (MFA-18)_DFB11 (MFB-11)_DFB21 (MFB-21) - MFC
comment: Now, building the scalfolding in the well. Once finish drift run. MFC run Expected today after lunch.

project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment: Injected the well all night shift. New brush arrives on board this morning. According to lookahead plan is to continue brushing today, inject the well, then rig up MFC40 19:00. If all goes to plan will be uploading data for FTA early Saturday morning.

project: PRJ03266 - Well Services Group (Exlog) - Exlog (WSG) - WRF-2 - GR_CCL
comment: Arrived on location at 9pm. Start preparing for rigup
Tools received back in Aberdeen 9th April 2026. Assessment underway of condition of the fleet prior to repair charges to SLB

project: PRJ03262 - SLB - SLB Denmark - DFA16 (MFA-16)_DFA18 (MFA-18)_DFB11 (MFB-11)_DFB21 (MFB-21) - MFC
comment: Now R/D DFB21. Plan is R/U on DFB11 tonight and do the drift run. Caliper run schedule on Friday afternoon depending on the progress of the well. No FTA required. Today's activities check backup tools

project: PRJ03307 - Well Sanam - Qatar Head Office - TBC - MFC
comment: Well Sanam is expected to mobilize on 7 May for a 7–10 day job, after which they will move to the well where we have memory MFC. Once Well Sanam mobilizes, we’ll have a 7–10 day window to bring the crew in.

project: PRJ03266 - Well Services Group (Exlog) - Exlog (WSG) - WRF-2 - GR_CCL
comment: READ engineer (Abdil) will be lead along with WSG trainee. The scope of the Job is to run a Memory GR-CCL run on Slickline to identify the HUD using GR (Check if the clean out was deep enough or not). Land operation in Groningen. Exlog organising flights, accom and hire car.
